creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 233385
git diff for devel/etl

This port was updated not too long ago. Which caused
two of the ports I maintain to stop building:

graphics/synfig
graphics/synfigstudio

As these 2 ports are so closely tied to version
updates of devel/etl, and given it's currently
maintained by ports@. I'm should probably set
myself as maintainer. The attached patch does just
that.

Changes: MAINTAINER

That's it.

Thanks!
